productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Rift Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style Note The nike Air Rift MTR for women with its split-toe for a customised Fit and incredible lightness is a favourite among comfort junkies who love sport. The shoe is made out of tough jersey material, and the bottom of the shoe has two channels that separate the ball of the foot from the rest. The Air Rift has an open top, and allows air to pass through the split toe. There is light lycra fabric under the toe and it breathes well. It also has a heel strap, so there is open air here as well. The padding on this shoe is designed for optimal grip. Product Details Fabric upper with a four-way stretch mesh that has a split toe for a customised fit Articulated forefoot with a hook-and-loop closure on the midfoot area Ankle strap at the back with a velcro closure with an a soft, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Full length, sculpted Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Air-Sole unit in the heel BRS 1000 Waffle outsole with a modified forefoot Material and Care Fabric, synthetic Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
